Perimeter = 32 ft

Side length = Perimeter / 4 = 32 ft / 4 = 8 ft

Now that we know the length of each side, we can find the area of the square. The area of a square is calculated by squaring the length of one side.

Area = Side length squared = 8 ft * 8 ft = 64 square feet
